message:
fix(channel/mpsc): cascade-wake next sender on cleanup + handle stale waiter gracefully

Two bugs fixed in cleanup_waiter():
1. Queue-removal path did not cascade-wake next sender when capacity
   was available, causing a lost wakeup if reserve future was dropped
   after being woken but before polling.
2. Stale waiter (externally removed, no reservation) hit debug_assert
   panic. Replaced with graceful no-op since no resource to transfer.

Also fixes database/mysql execute() OK packet parse error path leaving
connection closed=true despite complete protocol exchange.

All 38 mpsc tests + full cargo check --all-targets pass.
Audit entries for 29 files recorded in audit_index.jsonl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
